hero.title: T'Day
hero.subtitle: Un couteau suisse de la planification personnelle — avec un éditeur style Notion, des téléchargements de fichiers cryptés ultra-secrets, et une foule de petits extras géniaux !

features.title: Traitement du langage naturel
features.description: Saisissez simplement vos tâches naturellement. Notre moteur NLP intelligent extrait automatiquement les dates, les heures et les durées de votre saisie.
bullets: Détection instantanée de la date et de l'heure

features.title: Belle vue calendrier
features.description: Consultez toutes vos tâches d'un coup d'œil. Le calendrier intégré offre une vue d'ensemble claire de votre emploi du temps avec des indicateurs visuels intuitifs.
bullets: Catégories de tâches avec code couleur

features.title: Éditeur style Notion
features.description: Capturez vos pensées avec un éditeur puissant et sans distraction. Formatez le texte, intégrez des médias et organisez vos idées sans effort.
bullets: Coloration syntaxique des blocs de code

features.title: Stockage crypté de bout en bout
features.description: Vos fichiers sont protégés par un cryptage de qualité militaire. Stockez documents, images et pièces jointes en toute tranquillité.

securityDemo.title: Passkey
securityDemo.subtitle: Nous avons besoin de votre passkey pour décrypter vos fichiers

errors.fallback: Un problème est survenu, mais ne vous inquiétez pas, nous avons envoyé un rapport d'erreur.

footer.heroSubtitle: La plateforme de gestion de tâches intelligente conçue pour ceux qui ne sont pas si sains d'esprit.

terms.title: Conditions d'utilisation
terms.intro: En utilisant T'Day (le « Service »), vous acceptez ces Conditions d'utilisation.

1.title: Utilisation du Service
1.content: T'Day est une application de productivité gratuite pour gérer les tâches, les notes et les fichiers. Vous acceptez d'utiliser le Service légalement et de ne pas en abuser ni de l'interrompre.

2.title: Comptes
2.content: Vous êtes responsable de la sécurité de votre compte et de toute activité effectuée sous votre compte. Les informations doivent être exactes.

3.title: Votre Contenu
3.content: Vous conservez la propriété de votre contenu. En utilisant T'Day, vous accordez la permission de le stocker et de le traiter uniquement pour faire fonctionner le Service.

4.title: Utilisation Acceptable
content: Pas de contenu illégal, nuisible ou malveillant
Pas d'accès aux données d'autres utilisateurs

5.title: Disponibilité
5.content: T'Day est un projet personnel fourni au mieux. Le Service peut changer, être hors ligne ou être interrompu à tout moment.

6.title: Résiliation
6.content: Vous pouvez cesser d'utiliser T'Day à tout moment. Nous pouvons suspendre l'accès si ces Conditions sont violées.

7.title: Clause de non-responsabilité
7.content: T'Day est fourni « tel quel ». Nous ne sommes pas responsables de la perte de données, des interruptions ou des dommages résultant de l'utilisation du Service.

8.title: Changements
8.content: Nous pouvons mettre à jour ces Conditions. L'utilisation continue signifie que vous acceptez les changements.

9.title: Contact
9.content: Des questions ? Envoyez un e-mail à support

privacy.title: Politique de confidentialité
privacy.intro: T'Day (« nous », « notre » ou « nos ») est une application de productivité personnelle. Cette politique de confidentialité explique quelles données nous collectons et comment nous les utilisons.

1.title: Informations que nous collectons
content: Données de compte : adresse e-mail et fuseau horaire
Contenu utilisateur : tâches, notes et fichiers cryptés
Données techniques : adresse IP, informations sur le navigateur et la session
Cookies et stockage local pour l'authentification

2.title: Comment nous utilisons vos données
content: Maintenir la sécurité et prévenir les abus

3.title: Stockage des données et sécurité
3.content: T'Day utilise NextAuth pour l'authentification, NeonDB pour le stockage et Vercel pour l'hébergement. Les fichiers sont cryptés le cas échéant. Bien qu'aucun système ne soit parfaitement sécurisé, des mesures raisonnables sont prises pour protéger vos données.

4.title: Partage des données
4.content: Nous ne partageons les données qu'avec les prestataires de services requis pour exploiter T'Day. Nous ne vendons pas vos données personnelles.

5.title: Cookies
5.content: Les cookies et le stockage local sont utilisés pour les sessions de connexion, les préférences et la sécurité. La désactivation des cookies peut affecter la fonctionnalité.

6.title: Rétention des données
6.content: Nous conservons vos données tant que votre compte est actif. Vous pouvez supprimer votre compte à tout moment et votre contenu sera supprimé dans un délai raisonnable.

7.title: Vos droits
7.content: Vous pouvez accéder, corriger, supprimer ou exporter vos données en utilisant les fonctionnalités de l'application.

8.title: Changements
8.content: Nous pouvons mettre à jour cette politique de temps à autre. Les mises à jour apparaîtront sur cette page.

9.title: Contact
9.content: Des questions ? Envoyez un e-mail à support

aiSummary.description: Show a one-tap summary of your tasks.

summary.clearForNow: Tout est en ordre pour l'instant. Aucune tâche ne nécessite votre attention dans cette vue.
summary.title: Summary
summary.error: Couldn't generate a summary. Please try again.

guide.title: How-To & Tips
guide.subtitle: Everything T'Day can do — the obvious and the hidden.

root-feeds.title: Home and Anytime
root-feeds.summary: Two calm home feeds you switch between from the dock.
root-feeds.keywords: home, anytime, feed, dock, root, navigate, tabs
root-feeds.body: T'Day has two sibling feeds. Home holds your scheduled tasks for today and beyond. Anytime holds Floaters — tasks with no date. Switch between them from the dock at the bottom, and create a task from either one.

create-task.title: Create a task
create-task.summary: Add a scheduled task or a dateless Floater in a couple of taps.
create-task.keywords: create, add, new, task, plus, fab, compose
create-task.body: Tap the create button to add a task. Give it a title and, if it has a date, a due time. Leave the date off and it becomes a Floater in your Anytime feed instead.
create-task.tip: Start typing a date right in the title — T'Day reads it for you. See “Type the date”.

nlp-date-syntax.title: Type the date
nlp-date-syntax.summary: Write the date into the title and T'Day schedules it for you.
nlp-date-syntax.keywords: natural language, date, tomorrow, next week, parse, quick, smart, nlp, on device
nlp-date-syntax.body: You don't need to open a date picker. Type a date phrase straight into the task title and T'Day parses it on-device — no account or network needed — highlighting the part it understood and scheduling the task.

calendar-views.title: Calendar views
calendar-views.summary: See your scheduled tasks by month, week, or day.
calendar-views.keywords: calendar, month, week, day, agenda, view, dates
calendar-views.body: Open the calendar to see scheduled tasks laid out by month, week, or day. Swipe or use the chevrons to move between periods; the top-right button jumps you back to today without changing the view.

priorities.title: Priorities
priorities.summary: Flag what matters with Low, Medium, or High.
priorities.keywords: priority, high, medium, low, important, urgent, flag
priorities.body: Give a task a priority to mark how much it matters. Priority shows as a small accent dot on the task and helps sort what deserves attention first.

pin-task.title: Pin a task
pin-task.summary: Keep an important task at the top of its list.
pin-task.keywords: pin, pinned, stick, top, important, keep
pin-task.body: Pin a task to hold it at the top of its feed, above the normal order. Unpin it to let it fall back into place.

swipe-actions.title: Swipe actions
swipe-actions.summary: Swipe a task row for quick actions without opening it.
swipe-actions.keywords: swipe, gesture, slide, complete, delete, quick, row
swipe-actions.body: Swipe a task row to reveal quick actions — complete it, or remove it — without opening the task at all.
swipe-actions.tip: A completed task shows an undo toast for a few seconds, so a mis-swipe is never final.

long-press-actions.title: Long-press a task
long-press-actions.summary: Press and hold for more options and to start reordering.
long-press-actions.keywords: long press, hold, context menu, options, reorder, drag
long-press-actions.body: Press and hold a task to open its options, or to pick it up and drag it to a new position in the list.

drag-reorder.title: Reorder by dragging
drag-reorder.summary: Drag tasks into the order you want.
drag-reorder.keywords: drag, reorder, move, sort, order, arrange
drag-reorder.body: Your lists keep the order you give them. Drag a task up or down to arrange your day the way you think about it.

floaters-vs-todos.title: Floaters vs scheduled tasks
floaters-vs-todos.summary: Dateless tasks live in Anytime; dated tasks live in Home.
floaters-vs-todos.keywords: floater, anytime, unscheduled, dateless, todo, scheduled, difference
floaters-vs-todos.body: A scheduled task has a due date and shows up in Home and the calendar. A Floater has no date — it waits quietly in your Anytime feed until you're ready. Use Floaters for “someday” work that shouldn't clutter today.
floaters-vs-todos.tip: Floaters never appear on the calendar — that space is only for dated work.

floater-lists.title: Floater lists
floater-lists.summary: Group your Anytime tasks into their own lists.
floater-lists.keywords: floater list, anytime, group, list, category, groceries, packing
floater-lists.body: Organize Floaters into separate lists — groceries, packing, ideas — each with its own name and color, and its own completed history.

scheduled-lists.title: Lists for scheduled tasks
scheduled-lists.summary: Sort dated tasks into named, colored lists.
scheduled-lists.keywords: list, project, group, color, scheduled, category
scheduled-lists.body: Give scheduled tasks a list so related work stays together. Lists carry a name and color and can be filtered.

completed-history.title: Completed history
completed-history.summary: Everything you finished, kept for you to look back on.
completed-history.keywords: completed, done, history, finished, archive, past
completed-history.body: Finished tasks aren't discarded — they move to your completed history, grouped by day, so you can see what you actually got done.

overdue-view.title: Overdue
overdue-view.summary: A dedicated place for tasks whose time has passed.
overdue-view.keywords: overdue, late, past due, missed, carried over, backlog
overdue-view.body: Tasks whose due time has passed collect in the Overdue view so nothing slips silently. Reschedule them when you're ready.

search-tasks.title: Search your tasks
search-tasks.summary: Find any task by title, note, or list name.
search-tasks.body: Use the search field to filter your tasks instantly by title, description, or list name — no need to scroll.

recurrence-presets.title: Repeating tasks
recurrence-presets.summary: Make a task repeat daily, weekly, and more.
recurrence-presets.keywords: repeat, recurring, recurrence, every day, weekly, monthly, rrule, schedule
recurrence-presets.body: Set a task to repeat and it comes back on its own schedule. Pick from the presets — every day, weekday, week, or month — and completing one occurrence leaves the rest of the series intact.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.summary: Get a notification before a task is due.
reminders.keywords: reminder, notification, alert, alarm, notify, before
reminders.body: Add a reminder to a scheduled task and your device notifies you at the right time. Reminders are scheduled on your device, so they work even in Local Mode.
reminders.tip: Reminder lead-time options vary slightly by task — pick the one that gives you enough warning.

push-notifications.title: Web reminders (push)
push-notifications.summary: Let the web app notify you when a task is due, even when it's closed.
push-notifications.keywords: push, notification, web, browser, reminder, vapid, subscribe, due
push-notifications.body: In the web app you can turn on push notifications from Settings. Your self-hosted server then sends a reminder when a task's due time arrives — so the web app can reach you even when the tab is closed. You can complete the task straight from the notification.

home-widget.title: Home-screen widget
home-widget.summary: See today's tasks without opening the app.
home-widget.keywords: widget, home screen, glance, today, lock screen
home-widget.body: Add the T'Day widget to your home screen to glance at today's tasks. Tapping the widget opens the app at the right place.

widget-quick-add.title: Quick-add from the widget
widget-quick-add.summary: Start a new task straight from the widget.
widget-quick-add.keywords: widget, quick add, create, shortcut, home screen
widget-quick-add.body: The widget has a create button, so you can capture a task from your home screen without first opening the app — and it works in Local Mode too.

carplay.title: T'Day on CarPlay
carplay.summary: Glance at and capture tasks safely while you drive.
carplay.keywords: carplay, car, driving, voice, apple, hands free
carplay.body: On CarPlay, T'Day shows a focused, glanceable list built for the car, so you can check what's next or add a task by voice without reaching for your phone.

android-car.title: T'Day car screen
android-car.summary: A simplified in-app screen made for the car.
android-car.keywords: car, driving, android, voice, hands free, screen
android-car.body: T'Day includes a simplified car screen with large targets and voice capture, so you can add a task with minimal fuss while you're on the move.

local-mode.title: Local Mode
local-mode.summary: Use T'Day fully offline, with no server or account.
local-mode.keywords: local mode, offline, private, no account, no server, on device
local-mode.body: Local Mode keeps everything on your device — no login, no server, no upload. It's a first-class way to use T'Day privately, and your local data is never sent anywhere on its own.
local-mode.tip: Server-only features are shown here with a “Server mode” badge so you know what changes if you sign in.

server-mode.title: Server Mode
server-mode.summary: Sync across devices through your own private server.
server-mode.keywords: server mode, sync, self hosted, account, login, devices, realtime
server-mode.body: Sign in to your self-hosted server to sync tasks across devices in real time. Writes happen instantly on your device and replay to the server, so the app stays fast even on a shaky connection.

offline-sync.title: Offline sync
offline-sync.summary: Keep working offline; changes replay when you reconnect.
offline-sync.keywords: offline, sync, pending, queue, replay, connection, conflict
offline-sync.body: In Server Mode your changes are saved locally first and queued when you're offline. As soon as you reconnect, T'Day replays them to the server in order.

in-app-update.title: In-app updates
in-app-update.summary: Install the latest T'Day build from inside the app.
in-app-update.keywords: update, upgrade, version, install, apk, latest release
in-app-update.body: When a new build is available, T'Day can download and install it for you from the Latest Release screen, so you stay current without hunting for a file.

api-key-homarr.title: API key & Homarr
api-key-homarr.summary: Show your tasks on a dashboard with a personal API key.
api-key-homarr.keywords: api key, homarr, dashboard, integration, token, widget, homelab
api-key-homarr.body: Generate a personal API key in Settings to surface your tasks in a dashboard like Homarr. The key is tied to your account, so keep it private.
api-key-homarr.step0: Open Settings and find the API key card.
api-key-homarr.step1: Generate a key and copy it — it's shown once.
api-key-homarr.step2: Paste it into your dashboard's T'Day widget.

ai-summary.title: Task summaries
ai-summary.summary: A short, calm read on your day — with optional local AI.
ai-summary.keywords: summary, ai, ollama, overview, digest, local, private
ai-summary.body: T'Day can summarize your day in a sentence or two. With a local Ollama model it reads naturally; without one it falls back to a warm, deterministic recap — either way nothing leaves your server.
ai-summary.tip: The summary never depends on a cloud AI service — it's local or nothing.

keyboard-submit.title: Submit with the keyboard
keyboard-submit.summary: Save a task without reaching for the mouse.
keyboard-submit.keywords: keyboard, shortcut, submit, enter, save, hotkey
keyboard-submit.body: In the web app you can submit the task form straight from the keyboard, so quick capture never breaks your flow.
